Event: The Dark Adventure
Event Date: 25/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A216
Celestial Fate artifact

Triggers: 3 sec

Wrath of Heaven
Creates a star shower. The star shower lasts 6 sec. Stars fall on 2 random units every 1,5 sec: If a star falls on an ally, it removes 3 random negative effects and restores 25% health. The unit will also be immune to negative effects for 4 sec. afterwards.
If the star falls on an enemy, it removes 3 random positive effects and prevents them from gaining new ones for 4 sec. The affected enemy unit also takes 225000 pure damage for 3 sec. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
